mapper.select: SELECT * FROM secret_board ORDER BY bno DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{perPageNum} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE secret_board SET viewcnt = viewcnt + 1 WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE secret_board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, nickname = #{nickname} WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE secret_board SET agree = agree + 1 WHERE bno = #{bno}

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO secret_board (bno, title, content, nickname, password, regdate, viewcnt, agree) VALUES (secret_board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, #{nickname}, #{password}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM secret_board ORDER BY bno DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{perPageNum} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE secret_board SET viewcnt = viewcnt + 1 WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT password FROM secret_board WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: UPDATE secret_board SET agree = agree + 1 WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT agree FROM secret_board WHERE bno = #{bno}
